import json, os, re, unicodedata, math, itertools

quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json'
import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata, math, itertools
import json, codecs, io, numpy as np

# Load files
with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
len(quran_data), type(quran_data)
quran_data[0]

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
len(hadith_data), type(hadith_data[0])
hadith_data[0].keys()

import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub("", text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace("ـ", "")
    # Unify hamza/alif forms
    text = re.sub("[أإآٱ]", "ا", text)
    text = text.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي")
    # Unify alif maqsura
    text = text.replace("ى", "ي")
    # Optional: taa marbuta -> h or t? We'll keep ة as ه to ease approximate
    text = text.replace("ة", "ه")
    # Remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters (keep spaces)
    text = re.sub(r"[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A\s]", " ", text)
    # Collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming on lengths trimmed for small sizes
    # But we can compute ratio based on characters
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_score(a, b):
    # normalized by max length of a or b
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    a_n = normalize_arabic(a)
    b_n = normalize_arabic(b)
    lcs = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    denom = max(len(a_n), len(b_n))
    return lcs / denom, a_n, b_n

# test
similarity_score("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ", "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ")

full_span = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_arabic(snippet)

norm_full, norm_snippet

# Precompute normalized texts
quran_norm = []
for rec in quran_data:
    text = rec['ayah_text']
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    quran_norm.append(norm)

# Look for direct substring match of norm_full
matches_exact_substring = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if norm_full in norm]
len(matches_exact_substring)

indices_shukr = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if "الشكر" in norm]
len(indices_shukr), indices_shukr[:10]

indices_shkr = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if "شكر" in norm]
len(indices_shkr), indices_shkr[:10]

indices_f3l = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if "فعل" in norm]
len(indices_f3l), indices_f3l[:10]

indices_f3l_shukr = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if "فعل الشكر" in norm]
len(indices_f3l_shukr), indices_f3l_shukr

indices_w3dd = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if "وعدد" in norm]
len(indices_w3dd), indices_w3dd[:10]
quran_data[6180]

cand = quran_data[6180]['ayah_text']
sim, a_n, b_n = similarity_score(full_span, cand)
sim, a_n, b_n

# Build hadith texts
hadith_texts = []
hadith_norm = []
hadith_indices = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_data):
    text = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    if text:
        hadith_texts.append(text)
        hadith_norm.append(normalize_arabic(text))
        hadith_indices.append(i)

len(hadith_texts)

# Substring exact normalized search
matches_hadith = [i for i, norm in enumerate(hadith_norm) if norm_full in norm]
len(matches_hadith)

# Search for "الشكر"
matches_shukr_h = [i for i, norm in enumerate(hadith_norm) if "الشكر" in norm]
len(matches_shukr_h), matches_shukr_h[:10]

# Show that hadith
i = matches_shukr_h[0]
hadith_data[hadith_indices[i]].get('Matn') or hadith_data[hadith_indices[i]].get('hadithTxt')

hadith_text = hadith_data[hadith_indices[matches_shukr_h[0]]].get('Matn') or hadith_data[hadith_indices[matches_shukr_h[0]]].get('hadithTxt')
similarity_score(full_span, hadith_text)[0]

matches_f3l_shukr_h = [i for i, norm in enumerate(hadith_norm) if "فعل الشكر" in norm]
len(matches_f3l_shukr_h)

# Search hadith for "وعدد لكم" normalized "وعدد لكم"
tar = normalize_arabic("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ")
cands = [i for i, norm in enumerate(hadith_norm) if tar in norm]
len(cands), cands[:10]

# Search quran for "وعد لكم" "وعدكم" etc
targets = ["وَعَدَ لَكُمْ", "وَعَدَكُمْ", "وَعْدَكُمُ", "وَعَدَكُمُ", "وَعَدُلَكُم", "وَعَدَ لَكُم"]
for t in targets:
    norm_t = normalize_arabic(t)
    inds = [i for i, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if norm_t in norm]
    print(t, len(inds), [ (quran_data[i]['surah_name'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id']) for i in inds[:5]])

for i in [idx for idx, norm in enumerate(quran_norm) if normalize_arabic("وَعَدَكُمْ") in norm]:
    print(quran_data[i]['surah_name'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], ":", quran_data[i]['ayah_text'])

# Compute similarity across quran
best_q = []
for i, rec in enumerate(quran_data):
    sim = similarity_score(full_span, rec['ayah_text'])[0]
    best_q.append((sim, i))
best_q_sorted = sorted(best_q, reverse=True)[:10]
[(sim, quran_data[i]['surah_name'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_text']) for sim, i in best_q_sorted]

best_h = []
for i, text in enumerate(hadith_texts):
    sim = similarity_score(full_span, text)[0]
    best_h.append((sim, i))
best_h_sorted = sorted(best_h, reverse=True)[:10]
[(sim, hadith_texts[i][:120]) for sim, i in best_h_sorted]

matches_shkr_h = [i for i, norm in enumerate(hadith_norm) if "شكر" in norm]
len(matches_shkr_h)

# Show some
for idx in matches_shkr_h[:10]:
    print(hadith_texts[idx][:200])
    print("----")
